title: Ascorbic Acid Antifade Solution
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"cjmiu","text":"For use in Wet-mount Method for Enumeration of Aquatic Viruses.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[{"key":0,"offset":11,"length":52}],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{"0":{"type":"link","mutability":"MUTABLE","data":{"guid":"89756EBF230A462FA39FBC423CD874C1","url":"https://www.protocols.io/view/Wet-mount-Method-for-Enumeration-of-Aquatic-Viruse-c8pzvm"}}}}

steps: Dissolve 0.1 g ascorbic acid into 1 mL PBS creating a 10% (wt/vol) solution. Prepare fresh daily.
